beats.narration: You can name every sensing element. This lesson chooses between them. Five factors work like a funnel, and the right probe falls out the bottom.

payload.title: PICK THE PROBE
payload.sub: Five factors funnel down to one sensible probe.

beats.narration: Five questions, in order. Part. Discontinuity. Speed. Amount. Probable location. Each one eliminates options, so one or two candidates remain.
The part speaks first: geometry and access pick the arrangement. The flaw must cut the induced current, so orientation chooses direction, character chooses the mode.

payload.heading: Part picks geometry, flaw picks mode

beats.narration: Speed and amount set the mechanics: feed-through, or overlapping indexed passes. Then location: depth fixes frequency, deep targets need reflection probes and Hall detection.

payload.heading: Speed, amount, and depth finish it

beats.narration: Work the five in order and the selection nearly makes itself. There is no universal probe, only the right trade-offs, on paper.

payload.sub: No universal probe — just the right trade-offs.
